extension.summary: 100% save game downloader for XBMC4Xbox/XBMC4Gamers, specifically for use in Insignia lobbies that require (or benefit from) 100% unlocked content.
extension.description: 100% save game downloader for XBMC4Xbox/XBMC4Gamers, specifically for use in Insignia lobbies that require (or benefit from) 100% unlocked content.
